author: anon-a7c6025f
content: The 1,417 cuModuleLoadData calls are NOT from our PTX cache (which works). They're from cuBLAS JIT-compiling GEMM variants for every unique matrix shape. With KV cache, each decode step has a different seq_len for the attention bmm, causing cuBLAS to compile a new variant. This is a known cuBLAS behavior. Fix options: (1) Use cublasSgemm instead of the JIT path (CUBLAS_POINTER_MODE_HOST), (2) Pre-warm cuBLAS with all expected shapes, (3) Use our own matmul PTX kernel for small matrices to avoid cuBLAS entirely.
